name: Founders Brewing Co.
description: Grand Rapids' iconic craft brewery known for All Day IPA and CBS. Full taproom with kitchen serving elevated pub food.

name: Brewery Vivant
description: Farm-to-table brewery in a repurposed funeral chapel. Known for Belgian-style ales and locally sourced food.

name: New Holland Brewing (Knickerbocker)
description: Expansive brewpub in the historic Knickerbocker building. Dragon's Milk bourbon barrel stout is legendary.

name: Mitten Brewing Co.
description: Baseball-themed brewery and pizzeria in a converted firehouse. Family-friendly with great outdoor space.

name: Speciation Artisan Ales
description: Experimental wild and mixed-fermentation ales. Rotating tap list of sour and farmhouse styles.

name: Arvon Brewing Co.
description: Neighborhood taproom focused on New England IPAs heavily fruited sours and bold stouts.

name: Greyline Brewing Co.
description: Neighborhood brewery with rotating taps and a welcoming taproom on the northwest side.

name: Railtown Brewing
description: Small-batch brewery in the Heartside neighborhood. Known for olive burgers and approachable craft beer.

name: Atwater Brewery
description: Detroit-born brewery in the historic Rowe building. Rotating taps brewed exclusively for Grand Rapids.

name: Broad Leaf Local Beer
description: Sister brewery to Brewery Vivant. Approachable and innovative craft beer with a community taproom feel.

name: Perrin Brewing Co.
description: Award-winning brewery just north of GR. Known for Black Ale and a full kitchen with excellent pub food.

name: Vander Mill Cider
description: Michigan's premier craft cider taproom. Rotating seasonal ciders made from locally pressed Michigan apples.

name: Peoples Cider Co.
description: Grand Rapids' original craft cidery. Premium dry ciders made with Michigan apples in a relaxed taproom.

name: Eastern Kille Distillery
description: Craft spirits distillery and cocktail lounge. Inventive seasonal menus highlighting precision and playfulness.

name: Bier Distillery
description: Dutch-American inspired craft brewery and distillery. Unique blend of Dutch and American bar food and rotating craft beer.

name: Kusterer Brauhaus
description: Traditional German-style brauhaus on Bridge Street. Authentic lagers and ales brewed on-site with a German pub food menu.

name: Lost Art Brewhouse
description: Community brewery focused on recreating historic and forgotten beer styles from around the world.

name: Pink Barrel Cellars
description: Boutique winery and cidery with a relaxed tasting room. Michigan fruit wines and rotating seasonal ciders.

name: Mammoth Distilling
description: Craft distillery producing Michigan-sourced whiskeys gins and vodkas. Full cocktail bar with small bites.

name: Long Road Distillers
description: Grand Rapids' first craft distillery. Award-winning vodka gin and whiskey with a full cocktail menu and locally sourced food.

name: HopCat
description: Beloved craft beer bar with 100+ taps and famous crack fries. Lively atmosphere and extensive rotating tap list.

name: Stella's Lounge
description: GQ's best burger in America. 250+ whiskeys and retro arcade games. Iconic dive bar atmosphere downtown.

name: The Pyramid Scheme
description: Indie music venue and bar with pinball machines craft cocktails and rotating local and national acts.

name: SpeakEZ Lounge
description: Prohibition-inspired lounge with craft cocktails worldly cuisine and 12 craft taps. 8-time best brunch winner per Revue Magazine.

name: SIDEBAR
description: Tiny underground speakeasy with a massive reputation. Intimate craft cocktail bar with exacting attention to detail.

name: The Nightwatch Lounge
description: Hidden behind a nondescript door downtown. Classy impressionist-art-adorned lounge with boundary-pushing cocktails.

name: Buffalo Traders Lounge
description: Art deco blue-and-gold cocktail bar. Inventive cocktails ranging from elegant and refreshing to bold and smoky.

name: Drip Drop Cocktail Room
description: Playful and eclectic cocktail bar where every drink is an event. Creative seasonal menu on Bridge Street.

name: Less Traveled
description: Long Road Distillers' moody Cherry Street outpost. Seasonal cocktails with a free amuse-bouche and secret mystery menu.

name: Divani
description: Intimate big-city ambiance with scratch kitchen globally-inspired chef-driven menus and award-winning wine list.

name: Knoop Rooftop Cocktail Lounge
description: Grand Rapids' premier rooftop bar with sweeping city views. Made-from-scratch small bites and expertly crafted cocktails.

name: Cottage Bar & Restaurant
description: Open since 1927 — the oldest operating bar in downtown Grand Rapids. Casual charm and classic bar food.

name: Meanwhile Bar
description: Spacious beer garden with art-adorned red walls and arcade games. 13 Michigan beers on tap in a lively neighborhood setting.

name: Mo's Cocktail Lounge
description: Retro basement cocktail lounge beneath Mangiamo. Neon signs moody decor vintage art and photogenic approachable drinks.

name: J. Gardella's Tavern
description: 125-year-old hand-crafted bar in the Arena District. Over 100 beers and spirits with an eclectic menu in a historic warehouse.

name: Pursuit of Happiness Co.
description: Uptown craft cocktail bar named one of GR's best. Creative seasonal menu in a welcoming neighborhood setting.

name: Rezervoir Lounge
description: 24 beers on tap with a constant rotation of local and national microbrews. Classic olive burgers and neighborhood atmosphere.

name: Billy's Lounge
description: Beloved Eastown neighborhood bar with live music events cold drinks and a welcoming community vibe since 1986.

name: One Bourbon
description: Upscale pub menu with craft cocktails and an extensive bourbon selection on the lively Bridge Street corridor.

name: Social Misfits
description: Downtown bar and lounge named one of Yelp's top 10 GR restaurants 2026. Creative cocktails and a vibrant social atmosphere.

name: The Sovengard
description: New American restaurant with Scandinavian influences. Known for creative cocktails and a seasonally driven menu.

name: Grove
description: America's #3 Best Farm-to-Table Restaurant per Newsweek. Locally sourced seasonal menu in Eastown.

name: Leo's Seafood
description: Michigan's best seafood restaurant per LoveFood. Fine dining with floor-to-ceiling windows and an extensive wine list.

name: MDRD
description: Modern Spanish cuisine atop downtown GR. Tapas cocktails and a luxurious atmosphere.

name: Trust
description: Fixed-price multi-course New American soul food from chef Trimell Hawkins. $100 standard or $125 chef's table experience.

name: The Chop House
description: Upscale fine dining steakhouse downtown. Prime cuts private dining and an extensive wine cellar.

name: Butcher's Union
description: Meat-and-whiskey restaurant ranked #11 on Yelp's Top 100 US Restaurants 2026. Seasonal creative cocktails.

name: Terra GR
description: Eastown farm-to-table fixture in the old Kent Records building. Wood-fired pizzas locally sourced ingredients and craft cocktails.

name: Sugah Please Brunch Bar
description: New Orleans-inspired breakfast and brunch bar. Catfish and grits fried green tomatoes peach beignets and NOLA cocktails.

name: Garden District
description: New Orleans-inspired lunch and dinner. Classic NOLA drinks including hurricanes sazeracs and daiquiris.

name: Kawa Sushi
description: Fresh sushi rolls and Japanese entrees on Bridge Street. Daily 3-6 PM happy hour with 50% off sake and beer plus karaoke.

name: Garage Bar & Grill
description: Casual American bar and grill with burgers wings and rotating craft taps. Popular downtown happy hour destination.

name: Yesterdog
description: Michigan's most legendary restaurant per LoveFood. Vintage hot dog joint since 1976. Immortalized in the American Pie screenplay.

name: Wolfgang's Restaurant
description: Beloved Eastown breakfast institution serving Grand Rapids since 1977. Huge menu fresh food and friendly service.

name: Beltline Bar
description: Claimed inventor of the wet burrito in 1966. Mexican-American comfort food institution with millions of burritos served.

name: One Twenty Three Tapas
description: Downtown tapas bar with small plates craft cocktails and an energetic atmosphere. Top 10 GR restaurants on Yelp 2026.

name: Gin Gin's
description: Downtown favorite for creative cocktails and globally inspired small plates. Top 10 GR restaurants on Yelp 2026.

name: Littlebird
description: Intimate downtown restaurant with a rotating seasonal menu and a thoughtful wine and cocktail list.

name: Zivio
description: Eastern European-inspired restaurant in Eastown. Creative menu with pierogis smoked meats and craft cocktails.

name: The Old Goat
description: Neighborhood gastropub with an energetic atmosphere creative apps and an impressive beer and cocktail selection.

name: Luna
description: Once named best farm-to-table restaurant in Michigan by Travel and Leisure. Seasonally inspired menu in Eastown.

name: Two Beards Deli
description: Downtown sandwich shop with nearly 100 sandwiches named after celebrities. Daily soups and vegan options.

name: Madcap Coffee
description: Grand Rapids' premier specialty coffee roaster. Single-origin pour-overs and espresso drinks in a beautiful flagship downtown space.

name: Rowster Coffee
description: Michigan's best coffee shop per Business Insider. Small-batch blends roasted in-house in the Uptown neighborhood.

name: Lantern Coffee Bar
description: Specialty coffee bar in the Heartside district. Known for creative seasonal drinks and a warm welcoming atmosphere.

name: Bitter End Coffee House
description: Beloved Eastown neighborhood coffee house. Late hours and a cozy atmosphere make it a Grand Rapids institution.

name: Stovetop Coffee Roasters
description: Carefully sourced coffees from around the world. Cozy cafe with sweet and savory treats alongside exceptional espresso.

name: Midnight Express Cafe
description: Late-night coffee shop and cafe. Popular WFH spot with great food including the famous chicken pesto wrap.

name: Herman's Boy Coffee
description: Carrying on a Grand Rapids roasting legacy since 1901. On-premises roasting of highest grade coffees. Michigan's Best Hidden Gem 2024.

name: MudPenny
description: Specialty coffee shop in Boston Square. House-made sauces and syrups with Mooville creamline milk. Creative seasonal drinks.

name: Brody's Be Cafe
description: Community-focused specialty coffee cafe on the southeast side. Warm welcoming space with carefully sourced single-origin coffees.

name: Otono Coffee
description: Favorite neighborhood coffee shop with great coffee and a cozy downstairs seating area. Known for special seasonal offerings.

name: Kava Kasa
description: Unique kava and kratom bar offering a non-alcoholic alternative to nightlife. Relaxed social atmosphere open late.

name: That Early Bird
description: Contemporary cafe offering classic and creative breakfast and lunch dishes plus coffees. Lovely outdoor patio.

name: Sparrows Coffee
description: Award-winning specialty coffee roaster and cafe in Eastown. Sourcing beans from global regions known for clean fresh waters.

name: Café Jazzy Rose
description: Grand Rapids' first non-alcoholic cocktail bar. Jazz-inspired space with botanical elixirs Korean dalgona coffee and Southern comfort food.

name: Madcap Coffee (East Fulton)
description: Second location of Grand Rapids' premier specialty roaster. Same award-winning single-origin coffees in an Uptown neighborhood setting.

name: Vertigo Music & Coffee
description: Beloved downtown record store and coffee bar. A uniquely Grand Rapids combination of vinyl browsing and specialty espresso drinks.

name: Van Andel Arena
description: West Michigan's premier arena for concerts sports and family events. Home of the Grand Rapids Griffins hockey team. 12500 capacity.

name: GLC Live at 20 Monroe
description: Modern Art Deco inspired concert venue in the heart of downtown. Hosts diverse national and international artists. 2500 capacity.

name: The Intersection
description: West Michigan's home to legendary live music since 1972. Four stages — The Showroom Elevation The Stache and the Mint.

name: DeVos Performance Hall
description: Grand Rapids' premier 2543-seat performing arts facility. Hosts Broadway Grand Rapids Symphony Ballet and major touring acts.

name: St. Cecilia Music Center
description: Beautifully restored 1894 landmark. 630-seat auditorium considered one of the finest recital halls in the country.

name: Frederik Meijer Gardens
description: World-class sculpture park hosting the acclaimed Fifth Third Summer Concert Series with top national and international musicians.

name: Acrisure Amphitheater
description: Brand new 12000-seat outdoor amphitheater on the Grand River banks. Opened May 2026 with a packed season of major touring acts.

name: Fountain Street Church
description: Neo-Romanesque 1925 landmark seating 1500. Candlelight Concerts and historic performances by U2 Arlo Guthrie and NEEDTOBREATHE.

name: Tip Top Deluxe Bar & Grill
description: Intimate 140-person retro venue near GVSU's downtown campus. Beloved for local bands and renowned national touring artists.

name: Wealthy Theatre
description: Historic 1911 neighborhood cinema and event space. Hosts indie films live performances community events and film festivals.

name: Deltaplex Arena
description: Multi-purpose indoor arena on the northwest side. Hosts concerts sporting events family shows and community events.

name: Dr. Grins Comedy Club
description: Grand Rapids' premier comedy club inside The BOB. Regular stand-up with local and nationally touring comedians.

name: Circle Theatre
description: Only community theatre in West Michigan specializing in summer theatre. Three main-stage musicals plus concerts each summer.

name: Grand Rapids Civic Theatre
description: One of America's oldest and largest community theatres. Crowd-pleasing productions of well-known favorites year-round.

name: Belknap Park
description: Downtown park and outdoor event space. Home to major summer music festivals including the Upheaval Festival each year.

name: The B.O.B. (Big Old Building)
description: Downtown GR's iconic multi-venue entertainment complex. Multiple restaurants bars Dr Grins comedy club and Ashton cocktail lounge.

name: Midtown GR
description: Downtown live music venue and event space. Eclectic mix of national regional and local acts across multiple genres.

name: Belknap Lookout
description: Neighborhood park and outdoor gathering space on the north side. Hosts community events seasonal festivals and neighborhood gatherings.

name: Studio Park
description: Mixed-use downtown development with a cinema event spaces restaurants and bars. Hosts film premieres private events and community programming.

name: The Stache
description: Intimate stage inside The Intersection complex. Hosts up-and-coming national acts and the best local talent in a close-up setting.

name: Elevation at The Intersection
description: Second stage at The Intersection. Mid-size venue for touring acts with a great sightline from every spot in the room.

name: Ferris Coffee & Nut
description: Grand Rapids roasting institution since 1924. Downtown flagship cafe with house-roasted coffees fresh nuts and a beloved local legacy.

name: The Sparrows Coffee (Uptown)
description: Second Sparrows location in the heart of Eastown. Same award-winning specialty coffee in a cozy neighborhood cafe setting.

name: Madcap Coffee (Fulton)
description: Third Madcap location on East Fulton. Grand Rapids' most celebrated specialty roaster with the same exceptional single-origin coffee program.

name: Pour Coffee Parlor
description: Specialty coffee parlor on the Medical Mile corridor. Known for meticulously prepared espresso drinks and a warm neighborhood atmosphere.
